info.name: SDET API Testing Framework
info.description: Portfolio-grade Postman collection for API testing, validation, smoke testing, regression testing, negative testing, and defect discovery using ReqRes.

request.description: Automated API validation for Successful Login.

exec: pm.test("Response time is below configured SLA", function () {
pm.test("Response body is valid for this scenario", function () {
pm.test("Required response fields are present", function () {
pm.test("Authentication token exists and is stored", function () {

request.description: Automated API validation for Get Single User.

exec: pm.test("Response time is below configured SLA", function () {
pm.test("Response body is valid for this scenario", function () {
pm.test("Required response fields are present", function () {

pm.test("User object has required fields", function () { const data = pm.response.json().data; ['id','email','first_name','last_name','avatar'].forEach((field) => pm.expect(data).to.have.property(field)); });

request.description: Automated API validation for Get User List.

exec: pm.test("Response time is below configured SLA", function () {
pm.test("Response body is valid for this scenario", function () {
pm.test("Required response fields are present", function () {
pm.test("Data is a non-empty array", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json().data).to.be.an('array').and.not.empty; });

request.description: Automated API validation for Create User.

exec: pm.test("Response time is below configured SLA", function () {
pm.test("Response body is valid for this scenario", function () {
pm.test("Required response fields are present", function () {
pm.test("Created user id is stored", function () { pm.environment.set('createdUserId', pm.response.json().id); });

exec: pm.test("Response time is below configured SLA", function () {

pm.test("Defect observation: invalid schema is accepted by demo API", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.equal(201); });

exec: pm.test("Response time is below configured SLA", function () {

pm.test("Required response fields are present", function () {
pm.test("Defect observation: mandatory fields are not enforced by demo API", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json()).to.have.property('id'); });
